meaning: n.[植]多香果,多香果粉(一种香料)
examples: Aromatic west Indian tree that produces allspice berries.
These spices include clove, cinnamon, allspice, ginger, and nutmeg.
Pimento is called Allspice because its flavor suggests a blend of cloves, cinnamon and nutmeg.
We scramble through the mists up the side of one acropolis, clinging to the creepers and allspice trees that have overgrown it.
Next step: In a saute pan over medium heat, add 1 tablespoon of whole allspice, and 1 tablespoon of whole cloves (couple cinnamon stocks is good too) until fragrant.
